Goodbye Windows ... Hello Linux <<<<<<< HEAD /vchagas69.github.io/public/2009/08/20/goodbye-windows-hello-linux/ Thu, 20 Aug 2009 00:00:00 +0000
/vchagas69.github.io/public/2009/08/20/goodbye-windows-hello-linux/ ======= /vchagas69.github.io/2009/08/20/goodbye-windows-hello-linux/ Thu, 20 Aug 2009 00:00:00 +0000
/vchagas69.github.io/2009/08/20/goodbye-windows-hello-linux/ >>>>>>> fce113e627c1533a8ce3a8b254f5eb957259d17e After several (failed) attempts of adopting Linux as my main Operating System, I finally found a friendly enough Linux distro for a long time Microsoft user. It is Puppy Linux (http://www.puppylinux.org) and is currently on release 4.20. Download the CD image from the URL below. http://distro.ibiblio.org/pub/linux/distributions/puppylinux/puppy-4.2-k2.6.25.16-seamonkey.iso My adventures with this OS will definitely produce interesting writing material.
